text:
Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, keeps your heart strong and your weight in check.

However, physical health is not enough. Getting seven to nine hours of sleep each night is essential for your body to recover and your mind to stay sharp. Finally, do not forget your mental health. Managing stress through relaxation and maintaining a good work-life balance are just as important as eating your vegetables. Taking time for hobbies and rest helps you feel happier and more focused.
